connections.def: neuter of 2413; a sacred place, i.e. the entire precincts (whereas 3485 denotes the central sanctuary itself) of the Temple (at Jerusalem or elsewhere):--temple. see GREEK for 2413 see GREEK for
from a primary naio (to dwell); a fane, shrine, temple :--shrine, temple. Compare 2411. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phrase] prison, [phrase] steward, [phrase] tablet, temple, web, [phrase] within(-out).

connections.def: {a large public building, such as a palace or temple}
